docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FISHER, ARBERZINE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED COUNCIL OF HUMAN SERVICES (BROWN, BARBARA ) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
